title: Editorial magazine feature spread — "THE MAKERS" 6-page duotone portrait feature: masked + duotone hero portraits, a pull-quote colour-splash, licensed Stock paper/ink textures, a CSV-data-merged contributors strip, a vectorized masthead, laid out in InDesign and exported to print PDF, plus web crops

top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 9): The contributors roster is supplied as a JSON file, not a CSV. The data-merge template ContributorStrip.indd requires a linked CSV with exact column headers matching the placeholders. A JSON file cannot be linked in InDesign's Data Merge panel — no CSV means the merge never executes and the contributors strip page is unbuildable.

AGENT CHOKE on 'contributors_roster': document_merge_data_layout expects a genuine CSV bound to InDesign Data Merge placeholders, but the delivered file is contributors_roster.json. The agent has no CSV to link, so the merge step throws an immediate file-type error and halts the entire workflow before a single record is placed.
Executability 6/10: Missing contributors_roster.csv blocks document_merge_data_layout step entirely — highest-weight executability gap
qc_gaps: Per-asset self-QC averages 9.4/10, but package Executability scored 6 — assets are individually strong yet wrong/insufficient for the task.
